test_cases.title: Device Power-On Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Connect the device to a power source. 2. Turn on the device. 3. Verify the device's display is active.
test_cases.expected_result: The device's display is active and showing the home screen.

test_cases.title: Sensor Calibration Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Initialize the sensor. 2. Input a known value. 3. Verify the sensor reading matches the input value.
test_cases.expected_result: The sensor reading matches the input value within an acceptable margin of error.

test_cases.title: User Interface Navigation Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Access the device's menu. 2. Navigate through each menu option. 3. Verify each option functions as expected.
test_cases.expected_result: Each menu option functions correctly and as expected.

test_cases.title: Data Transmission Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Configure the device to transmit data. 2. Send a test data packet. 3. Verify the data is received correctly by the intended recipient.
test_cases.expected_result: The data is transmitted and received correctly without errors or data loss.

test_cases.title: Alarm and Alert Test
test_cases.steps: 1. Trigger an alarm condition. 2. Verify the alarm is audible and visible. 3. Silence the alarm and verify it resets properly.
test_cases.expected_result: The alarm is audible and visible when triggered, and resets properly after being silenced.
